title: NCHMCT JEE Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: NCHMCT JEE Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: National Council for Hotel Management JEE Result 2026 Out for UG Hospitality Course on the official website - exams.nta.nic.in on 22-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the NCHM JEE result.

content.text: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has officially released the NCHMCT JEE Result 2026 for admission to undergraduate hospitality courses. Candidates who appeared for the National Council for Hotel Management Joint Entrance Examination (NCHM JEE) can now check their scorecards online.

NCHMCT JEE Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://exams.nta.nic.in/nchm-jee/. The result is available for UG courses such as B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration. Students can check and download their results by logging in with their application number and date of birth.
Candidates are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the scorecard. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the examination authority for correction.

The NTA has released the NCHM JEE 2026 result for UG hospitality courses on 22 May 2026. Candidates can access their scorecards online using login credentials. The result is essential for further counselling and admission process.

The direct link to check NCHMCT JEE Result 2026 has been activated by NTA. Candidates can easily access their UG entrance exam scorecard through the official login portal. Use the link below to view and download your result instantly.

sections.heading: How to Check NCHMCT JEE Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to download your NCHM JEE 2026 scorecard online:

items: Click on the "NCHMCT JEE Result 2026" link
Enter your Application Number and Date of Birth
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference
